summary: Iteration 71 - Full backend + frontend testing of Marketplace Partners Ecosystem + AI City Partner Copilot Nudges + 8th legal template. Backend pytest 23/23 PASS (CRUD with tier/status/package validation + 409 dup email + 400 invalid enums; commissions + policies persist; create-login generates marketplace_partner user with marketplace_partner_id as STRING + temp_password; portal /me /leads /stats with source='marketplace_portal'; RBAC: sub-admin 403 + client 403 + marketplace_partner 403 on admin/*; Claude-powered copilot/analyze ~30s returns full schema; presentation generation ~25s returns 9+ slides with <=4 bullets each + key_takeaway + estimated_opportunity_text; city_partner nudges returns 3 items {title,body,priority} via Claude Sonnet 4.5; admin + client return 403 on /api/partner/copilot/nudges; legal /me/status returns compliant=true for city_partner). Extra spot-checks: DELETE soft-archives (status=terminated), IT collaborator dev1@team.com /api/legal/me/status still works (compliant=False because of IT docs gate - no marketplace pollution). Frontend (Playwright on REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL): /admin/marketplace-partners renders with marketplace-partners-page, stats grid (3 cards), add-mkt-partner + open-mkt-copilot buttons, 3 partner rows. Each row exposes pitch-{id} + login-{id} + edit-{id} testids (archive-{id} hidden for already-terminated row by design). Add-partner modal mkt-form-modal opens with all fields. AI copilot modal mkt-copilot-panel opens with run-mkt-copilot. Sidebar nav expanded under 'Parteneri Strategici' (nav-section-city_partners) reveals BOTH admin-nav-city_partners_list AND admin-nav-marketplace_partners_list. City Partner portal (/partner/dashboard for ion@blocadmin.ro) renders copilot-nudges-card with run-nudges button; clicking generates 3 nudges (nudge-0/1/2) with HIGH/MEDIUM badges and Romanian Claude-generated content.

issues: archive-{id} icon is hidden when partner.status is already 'terminated' - this is correct behavior but worth documenting. First (archived) row only shows pitch/login/edit; non-archived rows show all four icons including archive.
Same as iter70 - cookie consent banner overlays bottom can intercept clicks until dismissed. Not blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: routes/marketplace_partners.py (694 lines) - approaching 700 line guideline; consider splitting into admin/portal/ai/models when adding next features. Clean RBAC via _require_super/_require_marketplace_partner. ObjectId properly excluded via _serialize/_serialize_lead. linked_user_id and users.marketplace_partner_id stored as STRING (matches spec, avoids serialize_doc choke on /auth/login).

create-login is idempotent: returns {already_exists:true} when partner already linked, {linked_existing:true} when user with that email already exists (gets linked), {created:true, temp_password:...} only for net-new. Frontend correctly hides login-{id} icon once linked_user_id exists per spec.
_claude_json helper robustly strips ```json fences and finds first {...} block - resilient to Claude minor format drift.
Presentation generation includes ecosystem context (clients/specialists/partners counts) which Claude uses for personalization - good design. Output bullets capped at 4 server-side via slicing.
Copilot analyze limit(50) keeps prompt size bounded; growth_score coerced via int() with fallback 0.

Legal gate in routes/legal.py:222 now short-circuits for BOTH 'city_partner' and 'marketplace_partner' roles - skip IT docs requirement; verified compliant=True for city_partner role. The 8th template auto-seeds at startup with audience='marketplace_partner'.

Minor: ALLOWED_PACKAGES validation only runs when package is truthy in CREATE (line 228-229) - empty string would bypass; not critical because frontend always sends valid enum or null. PATCH also checks only 'package' in update keys.
Minor: marketplace_copilot_reports collection grows unbounded - consider adding TTL index or pagination view for admin in future iteration.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all required data-testids verified: marketplace-partners-page, add-mkt-partner, open-mkt-copilot, mkt-row-{id}, pitch/login/edit-{id}, mkt-form-modal, mkt-copilot-panel, run-mkt-copilot, admin-nav-city_partners_list, admin-nav-marketplace_partners_list, copilot-nudges-card, run-nudges, nudge-0/1/2)

test_credentials: Same as iter70 - all credentials work. admin@propmanage.io / 1!nasov01ADMIN | ion@blocadmin.ro / owKT6oOYMIyOSM!1A | testing.admin@propmanage.io / TestAdmin123! | client@propmanage.io / Client123! | dev1@team.com / Dev1Pass!.
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_Mkt_* partners in marketplace_partners (each with email TEST_mkt_<uuid>@example.com - prospect/active status, multiple categories). One TEST_Arc_* partner created and immediately archived (status=terminated) to verify DELETE flow. Several TEST_Lead + TEST_PortalLead entries in marketplace_leads. One marketplace_partner user account created via create-login (temp password used in test only, ephemeral). Reports persisted in marketplace_copilot_reports + marketplace_presentations + marketplace_nudges + city_partner_nudges collections.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_marketplace_partners.py - run with `cd /app/backend && REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://phased-document.preview.emergentagent.com python -m pytest tests/test_marketplace_partners.py -v` (the external URL must be exported because the test file asserts BASE_URL is non-empty). Total runtime ~80s due to two slow AI endpoints (copilot/analyze + presentation each take 25-35s). The created_partner pytest fixture is session-scoped and creates ONE partner used by all CRUD/leads/portal/presentation tests. RBAC test for marketplace_partner-on-admin is inline inside test_create_login_and_portal. Frontend testid name to remember: sidebar uses nav-section-city_partners (NOT nav-section-strategic_partners) but section heading is 'Parteneri Strategici' - admin-nav-marketplace_partners_list lives under it. Archive-{id} icon hides for terminated partners - don't expect it on every row.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Two cosmetic notes for future hardening: (1) archive icon visibility logic could be inverted to a 'restore' icon for terminated partners so admins can un-archive; currently terminated is final-via-UI. (2) Cookie banner z-index issue persists from iter70 - main agent already aware.
